name: Baboon
description:
### Special Abilities
[{"name": "Pack Tactics", "desc": "The baboon has advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the baboon's allies is within 5 ft. of the creature and the ally isn't incapacitated."}]

### Actions
[{"name": "Bite", "desc": "Melee Weapon Attack: +1 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 1 (1d4 - 1) piercing damage.", "attack_bonus": 1, "damage": [{"damage_type": "piercing", "damage_dice": "1d4-1"}]}]
